title: Connect your Ledger
subtitle: Use a hardware wallet to sign transactions without exposing your keys.

unsupported.title: Hardware wallet support requires a Chromium-based browser
unsupported.body: WebHID, used to talk to Ledger devices, is available in Chrome, Edge, Brave and Opera. Open this wallet in a supported browser to add a hardware account.

steps.1: Plug in your Ledger via USB
steps.2: Open the XRP app on the device
steps.4: Confirm the address on the device screen

app.notOpen: Open the XRP app on the device

errors.unsupported: WebHID is not supported in this browser.
errors.permission_denied: Browser permission was denied. Click Connect Ledger again and approve the prompt.
errors.no_device: No Ledger device found. Plug it in and try again.
errors.transport: Couldn't connect to the device. Reconnect the USB cable and try again.
errors.app_not_open: Open the XRP app on your Ledger and try again.
errors.app_locked: Unlock your Ledger with the PIN and try again.
errors.user_rejected: You declined the request on the device.
errors.timeout: The device didn't respond in time.
errors.path_forbidden: This derivation path is not allowed.
errors.address_mismatch: The address returned by the device doesn't match its public key. Disconnect and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while talking to the Ledger.

sign.title: Review on your Ledger
sign.body: Approve the payment on your device using both buttons.

disabled.title: Ledger sending is not yet available
disabled.body: Real XRPL transaction signing on Ledger devices is still being implemented. To send funds for now, switch to a software (seed-based) account in the account picker.
